auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password should be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email address and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetNewSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account. You were redirected here from the reset email.

sync.title: Connect your Outlook Calendar
sync.description: We'll import your meeting data to calculate costs and generate insights. Your data stays private and secure.

landing.heroTitle: Know the <highlight>real cost</highlight> of your meetings
landing.heroDesc: MeetWise connects to your Outlook calendar, calculates meeting costs based on team hourly rates, and uses AI to help you cut meeting waste.
landing.costVisibilityDesc: See the real euro cost of every meeting based on participant salaries and time spent.
landing.aiInsightsDesc: Get actionable recommendations to reduce meeting waste and improve productivity.
landing.outlookSyncDesc: Automatically import your calendar data from Microsoft Outlook with one click.

dashboard.syncError: We couldn't sync your calendar. Please check your Outlook connection.
dashboard.noTeamTitle: You're not part of a team yet
dashboard.noTeamDesc: Create a team to track meeting costs, or join an existing one using a team code from your manager.
dashboard.noCostDataSync: No cost data. Possible reasons: calendar not synced yet; no team members with hourly rate set (Team page); or attendee emails in meetings don't match any team member.
dashboard.noCostDataTitle: No cost data for this period
dashboard.noCostDataReasonRates: No team members with hourly rate set (Team page).
dashboard.noCostDataReasonEmails: Attendee emails in meetings don't match any team member.

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.subtitle: AI-powered analysis of your team's meeting patterns and cost optimisation opportunities.
insights.lastUpdated: Data based on real meeting costs · AI insights update when poll responses are collected
insights.kpiCostInfo: Sum of team_cost for every meeting in the selected period. Each meeting's cost = matched team members' hourly rates × duration. Members are matched by their Outlook email address.
insights.kpiEfficiencyInfo: Average of the AI efficiency score (0–100) across all meetings that have a generated AI insight. The score is produced by the AI based on poll responses (usefulness, focus, actual duration) and meeting metadata.
insights.kpiAnalyzedInfo: Number of meetings that have a generated AI insight (ai_insight is not null). A meeting gets an insight when you click "Generate" on the meeting detail page, or when the nightly cron runs.
insights.kpiSavingsInfo: 40% of the total cost of all meetings with an efficiency score below 50. The 40% coefficient assumes that roughly two-fifths of wasted-meeting spend is realistically recoverable through cancellations, shortened slots, or async alternatives.
insights.howItWorksEfficiencyBody: For each meeting the AI receives: meeting title, scheduled duration, participant count, estimated cost, and all poll responses (was it useful?, focus level, actual duration). It returns a score from 0 to 100 and a short insight text. Only meetings with a generated insight have a score.
insights.howItWorksRecsBody: When you click "Generate with AI", the model receives: total meeting cost, average efficiency score, number of low-efficiency meetings, the 3 most expensive meetings, and a summary of poll responses (useful / partially / no; focus high / medium / low). It returns 4–5 recommendations, each with a priority and an estimated monthly saving. These savings are AI estimates — they do not have to sum to Est. Monthly Savings.
insights.howItWorksSavingsBody: Est. Monthly Savings = 40% × (sum of team_cost for all meetings with efficiency score < 50). The 40% coefficient is a conservative assumption: improving or cancelling low-efficiency meetings will recover roughly two-fifths of their cost.
insights.recommendationsSubtitle: Actionable steps to reduce waste and cut costs
insights.rec1Desc: Your 8-person standup runs 23 min on average vs. 15 planned. Cutting to Mon / Wed / Fri recovers 2 sessions per week.
insights.rec2Desc: 7 of 14 attendees have not spoken in the last 3 sessions. Limiting to 8 core members reduces cost by 50%.
insights.rec3Title: Sprint planning runs 2× longer than benchmark
insights.rec3Desc: Industry benchmark for 2-week sprints is 2 h. Your sessions average 4.2 h — time-boxing would recover 2.2 h per sprint.
insights.rec4Title: Friday afternoon meetings show low engagement
insights.rec4Desc: Meetings scheduled after 15:00 on Fridays have 34% lower usefulness scores in post-meeting polls. Move to mornings.
insights.rec5Title: 3 recurring status meetings could be async
insights.rec5Desc: Mon / Wed / Fri status updates have zero action items 67% of the time. A shared doc would save 6 h of meeting time per week.
insights.freeSubtitle: Get GPT-4o powered analysis of your team's meeting patterns and discover exactly where budget is being wasted.
insights.freeBenefit2: Meeting efficiency scores for every session
insights.freeBenefit3: Trend analysis and monthly cost forecasts
insights.aiProviderNotConfiguredEnable: to enable AI recommendations. Alternatively set
insights.noRecommendationsBody: Click "Generate with AI" to get personalized insights based on your team's meeting data.
insights.efficiencyEmptyHint: Efficiency scores appear after AI analysis of poll responses
insights.detailsSubtitle: See exactly how metrics like Meetings Analyzed, Avg Efficiency Score and Estimated Monthly Savings are calculated for each meeting in this period.
insights.detailsExplanation: Average AI efficiency score across all meetings with an AI insight.
insights.detailsStatAnalyzedSub: Meetings with a generated AI insight
insights.detailsStatSavingsSub: 40% of cost from meetings scoring below 50
insights.detailsStatCostSub: Total meeting cost in this period
insights.detailsReasonNoPollNoInsight: No poll answers and no AI insight yet.
insights.detailsReasonHasPollNoInsight: Has poll answers but AI insight not generated yet.
insights.detailsReasonOther: Not included due to missing or pending data.
insights.detailsTableSubtitle: Each row shows how a meeting contributes to AI Insights: which ones are included in the average efficiency score, analyzed by AI, and counted towards savings.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.emptyHint: Try a different range or sync your calendar.

poll.duration: What was the actual meeting duration?
poll.alreadyAnsweredBody: Your response for this meeting has been saved.

forecast.title: Cost Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Projections & Time Range Analysis
forecast.empty: No costs found for this period.
forecast.emptyHint: Are meetings imported and hourly rates set?
forecast.disclaimer: * Projections are linear extrapolations based on the entered monthly value. Seasonal variations and company changes are not included.

team.title: Team Management
team.noTeamTitle: You're not part of a team yet
team.noTeamDesc: Create a team to start tracking meeting costs, or ask your manager for an invite link.
team.addMembersSubtitle: Add one or more members at once
team.noMembersHint: Add members so their meetings can be matched and costed.
team.recalcTitle: Recalculate meeting costs from current member rates
team.sendJoinLinksDesc: Each member will receive an email with the team invite link.
team.addMembersBtn: Add {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}}
team.emailSendFailed: Could not send invite emails. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hourlyRateDesc: Choose how meeting costs are calculated for your team.
settings.perMemberDesc: Set individual hourly rates for each team member.
settings.noRatesDesc: Cost calculations are disabled. Meeting costs will not be shown on the dashboard.
settings.freePlanDesc: AI insights are only available on Pro
settings.disconnectCalendarDone: Outlook calendar disconnected for this user.
settings.clearCalendarDesc: Remove all imported calendar meetings for your team. This cannot be undone, but you can sync again from Outlook to re-import events.
settings.clearCalendarDone: All calendar items for your team have been removed.
settings.planTestDowngrade: Switch back to Free plan (test only)
settings.planTestDowngradeDesc: For testing only: change your team from Pro back to Free. Only team managers can use this button.
settings.planTestDowngradeDone: Team plan changed back to Free.

onboarding.title: Set up your team
onboarding.desc: Create a new team or join an existing one to start measuring meeting costs.
onboarding.createDesc: You'll be the team manager and can invite others.
onboarding.joinDesc: Enter the team code your manager shared with you.
onboarding.skip: Skip for now, go to dashboard
onboarding.whatNextDesc: After your team is set up, you can connect your Outlook calendar from the dashboard to automatically import meetings and see their real cost.
onboarding.whatNextItem4: Get AI insights to reduce waste

surveys.title: Meeting Polls
surveys.subtitle: Rate your past meetings from the last {days} days — your poll answers power the AI insights.
surveys.emptyHint: No meetings to rate in the past {days} days.
